message:
test(tui): add model selector edge case tests (bd-4ma1)

Add additional TUI state tests for the model selector overlay covering
boundary conditions identified during bd-4ma1 implementation:

- Model selector blocked during agent processing (Ctrl+L while busy)
- j/k vim-style navigation within the model selector dropdown
- Wrapping behavior at list boundaries
- Selection confirmation and overlay dismissal

These tests complement the existing model selector + scoped cycling
test suite with edge cases that were missing coverage.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
